title: Operations Visibility Schema Tranche Live Execution And Validation
objective: Apply the bounded `09` Operations Visibility schema tranche live in Supabase and validate that the exact type, columns, enum entries, and views land with the intended security posture.
dependency_note: Packet 046 restored a truthful advisor path and reopened live execution of the `09` tranche as the next bounded move.
execution_steps: Apply the `09` Operations Visibility schema tranche through Supabase.
If live compilation exposes a local tranche defect, harden the tranche source rather than bypassing the failure ad hoc.
Retry the bounded apply after the local tranche defect is repaired.
Validate the exact live artifacts landed: enum type, target columns, target views, `security_invoker` posture, and target enum entries.
constraints: Mutate only the bounded `09` Operations Visibility tranche and its direct source-of-truth files.
Do not widen scope into unrelated legacy advisor debt, runtime services, package manifests, lockfiles, or old-clone state.
Do not treat a partially successful first migration attempt as closure; rerun only after the tranche source itself is corrected.

execution_evidence.first_apply_failure_1: invalid input value for enum apparatus_assessment: "Non-Serviceable"
execution_evidence.first_apply_failure_2: invalid input value for enum project_status: "In Progress"
source_hardening_applied: `v_project_apparatus_summary` and `v_master_operations` now compare `assessment` as text when referencing future enum labels.
`v_master_operations` now compares `project_status` as text when referencing `In Progress`.

execution_rationale: The first live apply attempt exposed real tranche-local defects instead of generic platform blockers, so the correct repair was to harden the tranche source itself and rerun the bounded migration.
After those local fixes, the live apply succeeded and the exact intended artifacts landed in Supabase.
Post-apply verification confirmed the bounded outcome directly in the database, and a refreshed security-advisor search did not report any of the 11 new `09` views.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 048 - Operations Visibility Runtime Consumption Planning
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-06 as the direct follow-on to Packet 046. Packet 047 applied the bounded `09` Operations Visibility schema tranche live in Supabase, repaired three tranche-local idempotency/enum-compatibility defects exposed by the first attempt, reran successfully, and verified the full intended live artifact set plus the security posture of the new views.
next_action: Execute `Olares Dev Residency 048 - Operations Visibility Runtime Consumption Planning`.
